Simple process
Order in 3
easy steps

No app, no account, no hassle. Just send a WhatsApp message and your order arrives.

01

Message us on WhatsApp

Tap the button and say "Hi" — our team responds instantly, ready to take your order.

02

Tell us what you need

Share your list — groceries, snacks, drinks, essentials. We confirm and get packing.

03

Delivered to your door

Our rider picks, packs and delivers in 10–30 minutes. Pay cash or UPI — done.

Our promise
Why choose OCEON?

We built OCEON because we live here too. Speed, trust and simplicity — that's our commitment.

⚡

Lightning Delivery

Our dark store is hyperlocal — right in your neighbourhood. Most orders reach you in 10 minutes or less.

💬

WhatsApp First

No app to download. No account to create. Order just like you'd text a friend — simple and instant.

✅

Zero Confusion

We confirm every order before dispatching. No wrong items, no surprises. Simple order, every time.

🛡️

Reliable, Always

Trained riders, quality-checked stock, real-time updates on WhatsApp. You'll always know where your order is.

💳

Pay Your Way

Cash on delivery or UPI — your choice. No hidden fees, no minimum surprises. What you see is what you pay.

🌱

Eco-Friendly Packing

Every order ships in our branded paper bags — durable, sustainable, and crafted with care. Fast and responsible.
